summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Tema Photonics & Optical ETF (LAZR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund actively manages a global portfolio of stocks identified by the Adviser as belonging to the photonic and optical industry, which includes companies involved in the design, development, manufacturing, production, and distribution of photonic or optical products. LAZR was launched on Jun 30, 2026 and is issued by Tema.

data.title: Tema Launches Memory ETF (DISK) and Photonics & Optical ETF (LAZR)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Tema ETFs (“Tema”), a leader in institutional-quality and actively managed exchange-traded funds, today announced the launch of the Tema Memory ETF (DISK) and the Tema Photo...

data.title: QCI (QUBT) Acquires Luminar Photonics Unit for $110 Million in Court-Approved Deal
data.text: Quantum Computing Inc. ($QUBT), also known as QCI, has signed a $110 million agreement to buy Luminar Semiconductor, a unit of Luminar Technologies Inc. ($LAZR). The deal is an all-cash…

data.title: Luminar Technologies (LAZR) Plunges 60% after Filing for Bankruptcy
data.text: Vehicle technology firm Luminar Technologies ($LAZR) has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy in the Southern District of Texas after losing a major contract with automaker Volvo AB ($VLVLY) in November.
